zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前BNB/USD整体呈震荡偏弱格局，价格运行在608附近，略低于20日均线611.6，短线多头动能不足，市场进入高位整理阶段，方向选择尚未明确。

MACD柱体维持负值并走弱，空头动能占优但未明显放大，RSI缺失使超买超卖判断受限。从结构看价格虽贴近日内高点，但缺乏突破确认信号。

下方支撑关注606.4日内低点，若失守或回踩600整数关口；上方阻力在611.6均线及615附近，突破需放量配合，否则易形成假突破。

交易策略建议以区间思路为主，高位接近阻力可轻仓试空，回落支撑附近关注反弹机会，严格设置止损，等待趋势明朗后再顺势跟进。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD is currently consolidating after a mild intraday advance, trading at 608.46 with a marginal 0.23% gain. Price action remains compressed near the session highs, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. However, the broader short-term structure is slightly pressured as the pair trades below the 20-period SMA at 611.61. Momentum appears neutral-to-soft, with limited follow-through in either direction. Market participants are awaiting a clearer directional catalyst.

Momentum indicators reflect a cautious stance. The MACD reading at -2.69311 indicates bearish pressure is still present, although the lack of a signal line value limits confirmation of trend strength. With RSI unavailable, price action becomes the primary guide, and current movement suggests weakening upside momentum. The position relative to the SMA reinforces a slight bearish bias in the short term. Volume remains subdued overall.

Immediate support is identified near 606.40, aligning with the session low, while psychological support sits around the 600 level. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at the 20-period SMA around 611.61, which has capped recent advances. A sustained break above this level could open the path toward 615 and potentially 620, where prior supply zones may re-emerge. Price reaction around SMA will be critical here.

Short-term trading conditions favor range-bound strategies until a decisive breakout occurs. Scalpers may look to fade moves near resistance at 611.61 and accumulate near support at 606.40, while breakout traders should wait for confirmation above the SMA for long entries. Risk management remains essential given the tight consolidation and potential for abrupt volatility shifts. Position sizing should remain conservative in this environment. Overall bias is neutral.
